data.description: Fourth round of US-Mexico review talks planned for early September: Mexico economy ministry

data.title: U.S. withdraws subpoenas to NY Times journalists after judge questions government's actions. Times denounces as attack on press.
data.description: A federal judge has expressed doubts about the government's management of subpoenas, which were labeled as a tactic to intimidate the free press by The Times.

data.title: UNITE HERE Local 11 Sues State Prisons for Withholding Information About Embattled Prison Food Service Contractor Aramark
data.description: In Phoenix, UNITE HERE Local 11, a union advocating for numerous Arizona food service employees, recently initiated legal action against the Arizona prison system in state court. The lawsuit, filed last Friday, accuses the system of withholding data regarding prison food service and the efficacy of Aramark, the primary food service contractor. Aramark, a prominent contractor for various state establishments in Arizona such as ASU and the Phoenix Convention Center, amassed roughly $18.5 billion in revenues.

data.title: World Cup impact: Some cities thrived, others disappointed in tourism gains. Winners and losers revealed post-event.
data.description: Various locations that hosted the World Cup had high hopes for the event, with some exceeding expectations while others falling short. The breakdown reveals the outcome of the tournament for host cities, hotels, tourism boards, and more.

data.title: New tariffs of about 10% to be imposed by Trump admin on over 80 nations, targeting goods made with forced labor.
data.description: The new administration has introduced revised duties linked to imports of products manufactured using forced labor, as a replacement for the current worldwide 10 percent tariff that was due to end at midnight.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap Selects Deferred as Preferred 1031 Exchange Provider
data.description: A commercial real estate brokerage firm, Marcus & Millichap (NYSE: MMI), based in Calabasas, California, has partnered with Deferred, a technology-based qualified intermediary that focuses on transforming 1031 exchanges for real estate investors. This partnership is part of Marcus & Millichap's Preferred Partner Program and aims to offer 1031 exchange solutions to investors. Marcus & Millichap is known for its expertise in investment sales, financing, research, and advisory services. This collaboration signifies an important move in enhancing services for everyday real estate investors seeking 1031 exchange solutions.

data.title: German AI lab, Black Forest Labs, launches FLUX 3: 1st video model. Robots learn on Audi line using the new system.
data.description: The initial video model created by the German AI lab is FLUX 3. This model is now being utilized to train robots for tasks in an Audi assembly line.

data.title: ATN International to Host Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on August 6, 2026
data.description: Beverly, Massachusetts - ATN International, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATNI), a digital infrastructure and communications services provider, is set to report its Q2 2026 financial results on August 5, 2026, post-market hours. A conference call to review these results will take place on August 6, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time. This move aims to provide insights and analysis into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Market Technology Acquisition Corp Announces the Pricing of $200 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: A special purpose acquisition company, Market Technology Acquisition Corp, based in New York, revealed the pricing of its initial public offering on July 23, 2026. The IPO consists of 20,000,000 units priced at $10.00 each, including one Class A ordinary share and half of a redeemable warrant. Holders of whole warrants can purchase one Class A share at $11.50. The units will be available for trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “MTAKU” starting July 24, 2026. Following separation, ordinary shares and warrants will trade as “MTAK” and “MTAKW” on Nasdaq. No fractional warrants will be issued, only whole warrants.

data.title: Gemini transferred $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after CFTC agreement, possibly impacting $5M settlement.
data.description: Support for Donald Trump can be facilitated through a Bitcoin donation, amidst a New York court's deliberation on potentially overturning a significant $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

data.title: Almonty to Voluntarily Delist From ASX
data.description: In Dillon, Montana, Almonty Industries Inc. (NASDAQ: ALM) (TSX: AII) (ASX: AII) (Frankfurt: ALI1) has officially requested and been granted approval by the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) to be delisted pursuant to ASX Listing Rule 17.11. This decision comes in light of the Company's choice to remove its common shares from the Toronto Stock Exchange.

data.title: Zoomcar Announces Extension of Offer to Exchange Outstanding Warrants for Common Stock
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: ZCAR), a prominent peer-to-peer self-drive car-sharing marketplace in India, revealed an extension in the expiration date for its offer to exchange specific outstanding warrants for shares of the Company's common stock. This strategic move aims to enhance shareholder value and strengthen the Company's market position.

data.title: Heimstaden Bostad AB (publ) Issues SEK 500 Million Green Floating Rate Notes
data.description: Heimstaden Bostad AB (publ) has successfully priced SEK 500 million in green senior unsecured floating rate notes with a 5-year maturity and a coupon of 3 months STIBOR plus 1.18 percent. The funds raised will align with Heimstaden Bostad’s Green Financing Framework, dictating the use of proceeds from green bonds issuance. Sustainable Fitch has granted an “Excellent” Second-Party Opinion after reviewing the framework. Application for listing the notes on Euronext Dublin is underway. Final terms will be accessible on Euronext Dublin and heimstadenbostad.com. Nordea and SEB served as joint bookrunners in this transaction.

data.title: DYWIDAG Group - DSI Holding GmbH has successfully priced a subsequent bond issuance and initiates written procedure under its existing bonds
data.description: A EUR 50 million bond issue has been priced to help fund the purchase of Interspan (Holdings) Pty Limited.

data.title: US Capital Global Announces Successful $600 Million Bond Sale, Expanding Institutional Distribution Platform for Private Market Securities
data.description: The recent transaction highlights the company's proficiency in facilitating the distribution of significant private market debt and linking issuers with institutional capital globally. This underscores the firm's capability to handle large-scale transactions and serve as a conduit for connecting issuers with institutional investors across the world.
